import os
import subprocess
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List

import boto3


@dataclass
class ModelConfig:
    model_name: str
    region: str = "us-east-1"
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    _s3_client: object = field(init=False, repr=False)
    _model_artifact: bytes = field(init=False, repr=False, default=b"")

    def __post_init__(self):
        self._s3_client = boto3.client("s3", region_name=self.region)
        self._model_artifact = self._s3_client.get_object(
            Bucket="models-bucket", Key=f"{self.model_name}/artifact.bin"
        )["Body"].read()
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["sha256sum", "/tmp/artifact.bin"],
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30,
        )
        self._checksum = result.stdout.strip()
